## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy for Firework's blog, focusing on holiday-related topics and new AI-powered content enhancements.](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to holiday-specific content, creating comprehensive guides for each major shopping holiday](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Incorporate industry-specific variations and sales-boosting tools into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Experiment with AI-powered audio summaries (Google's Notebook LLM) to enhance blog engagement and potentially improve SEO](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

## Topics

### Holiday Content Strategy

  - [Create content around holiday shopping trends, strategies, checklists, and stats](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Replicate content structure across various holidays (e.g., Black Friday, Cyber Monday, Christmas)](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Focus on B2B angle: e-commerce strategies for businesses, not B2C shopping tips](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Include industry-specific variations (e.g., fashion, electronics, beauty)](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Incorporate Firework's product features (e.g., video shopping, one-to-one shopping) into holiday-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [List complementary tools (e.g., email marketing) alongside Firework's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Restructure blog with hub-and-spoke model, categorizing content by topics (e.g., e-commerce, brand, shoppable video)](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)

### AI-Powered Content Enhancement

  - [Experiment with Google's Notebook LLM to generate audio summaries of blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Consider converting audio summaries to YouTube videos for embedding](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Explore multi-channel content distribution (blog, podcast, video, slides)](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Mix up content structure to avoid AI-generated content fingerprinting](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Include infographics and varied media to improve perceived content quality](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Note: Time on page is not a direct ranking factor, but click-through behavior on search results pages is important](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create content angles for holidays: strategy, checklist, trends, stats](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Develop new topics around sales-boosting tools and industry-specific variations](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Coordinate with web development team to integrate audio summaries into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Begin experimenting with Google's Notebook LLM for content enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Review and refine content strategy based on performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/nx5V_4h-c75daDxipatpYVybKFtcXuaB?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
